payload.answer: SELECT access is permitted in this mode; DELETE access is denied.
citations: Input: "Admin SQL select-only mode - SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied"

entity_resolution.reason: No specific memory entity is being referenced for resolution; this is a permissions/debug fixture.

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL is in select-only mode: SELECT queries such as SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 are allowed, while DELETE FROM memory_cards is denied.

details: Interpreted the mode as read-only for SQL.
No deletion action should be taken in this mode.

repair_options: If the goal is to read memory entries, use SELECT-only queries.
If deletion is needed, switch out of select-only mode or use an authorized write-capable path.
